turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking or Changing a medical appointment

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I’d like to make an appointment to see a doctor.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. What’s the reason for your visit today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, my visit today is just for a general checkup.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. A general checkup is noted. When would you like to come in for the appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Is the Doctor available next Friday?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. Next Friday has some openings. What time of day works best for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It could be possible around 2 p.m?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, 2 p.m. next Friday works. Do you have a preferred doctor for this checkup?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I don't have any preference, whoever doctor is available is fine for me.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. I’ll book you with any available doctor. Could I get your full name for the appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Natalia Cardona

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, Natalia Cardona. Could I have a contact phone number for the booking?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, 0415677347 noted. Are you a new patient at this clinic?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I am.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Since you’re a new patient, could I get your date of birth for the registration?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 9th of November 1997.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, 9 November 1997 noted. Do you have a Medicare or insurance number we can add to your file?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, I have the Bupa insurance.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, Bupa noted. Could you give me your Bupa membership number?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, your Bupa number is noted. Could I get your home address for your new-patient file?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 1-4-2 Elizabeth Street, Sydney, New South Wales, 2000.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, your address is noted. Could I also get an email address for appointment reminders?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Natalia.Cardona at Hotmail.com

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, your email is added. Would you like to confirm all these details for your appointment next Friday at 2 p.m.?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I confirm.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. Your appointment is all set. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: That's all for today. Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Thanks for coming in today—take care and have a good one.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you. you too. Bye.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Bye now.
